title: Inferring High-Level Events from Timestamped Data: Complexity and Medical Applications
summary: In this paper, we develop a novel logic-based approach to detecting high-level temporally extended events from timestamped data and background knowledge. Our framework employs logical rules to capture existence and termination conditions...
